name: state_files
description: Demonstrates the StateExpectation block: files_exist, files_contain, files_not_exist, capture_git_diff. Asks the agent to add a tests file and asserts the file exists, contains 'def test_', and the original calculator.py is unchanged. capture_git_diff stores the diff in TurnOutput so a downstream LLM judge can inspect it.

turns.message: Create a new file tests/test_calculator.py with a single pytest test named test_add_basic that imports add from src.calculator and asserts add(1, 2) == 3. Use Python imports relative to the project root (the package is named 'calculator' in src/). Do not modify any other file.
